LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_DebugLoggingD: Write normal core Space Services diagnostics to the RimWorld log. Integration details use their own verbose toggles below.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_VerboseCoreLo: Write extra shared lifecycle, shuttle, cleanup, and service pawn diagnostics. Does not enable Hospital, Hospitality, or Trader Ships logs.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_VerboseHospit: Write extra Hospital patient arrival, departure, and cleanup diagnostics.
Write extra Hospitality guest arrival, bed, lord, and departure diagnostics.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_VerboseTrader: Write extra Trader Ships bridge diagnostics when that integration is active.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_AutoExtractDe: Let Space Services recover service visitors that are ready to leave but get stuck outside the normal departure path.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalDesc: Enable space-map handling for Hospital patient arrivals and departures.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityDe: Enable space-map handling for Hospitality guest arrivals and departures.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityRe: Require free guest beds for Hospitality arrivals
Block new Hospitality guest groups unless enough free guest beds are available.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityAu: After a grace period, send away Hospitality guests who cannot find usable guest beds.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityVa: Periodically interrupts Hospitality guests who try to walk through unsafe vacuum. Off by default because it runs during map ticks.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityFa: Space Hospitality fallback visits (use if Hospitality is not spawning guests)
Schedule Space Services visitor groups directly when Hospitality's normal space-map incident flow is not producing guests.
Base interval for fallback Hospitality visits when traffic-rate override is disabled. Snaps to 0.25 day steps.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_TrafficRateOv: Use deterministic service-rate limits instead of the raw incident cadence. At 0.25x, every fourth eligible attempt is allowed.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalPatie: Deterministic rate for normal Hospital patient arrivals. 0.00 blocks new arrivals; existing patients can still leave.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalMassC: Deterministic rate for Hospital mass casualty arrivals. 0.00 blocks new mass casualties.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityVi: Deterministic rate for native Hospitality visitor incidents, and interval scaler for fallback visits.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_HospitalityFa: Hospitality fallback interval is scaled by visitor traffic rate while override is enabled.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Settings_SealedNoSuitD: Allow arrivals without forced vacsuits when the selected service pad is in a safe sealed environment.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ModeHospitalOnly: Use this pad only for Hospital patient arrivals and departures.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ModeHospitalityO: Use this pad only for Hospitality guest arrivals and departures.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ModeSharedDesc: Use this pad for Hospital and Hospitality traffic without preferring either service.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ModeHospitalPrio: Use this pad for Hospital and Hospitality traffic, preferring Hospital patients.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ModeHospitalityP: Use this pad for Hospital and Hospitality traffic, preferring Hospitality guests.
LanguageData.JDB_SpaceServices_Gizmo_ReportMapDesc: Write the current map's Space Services eligibility reasons to the log.
